summary: 02:30Z cycle. prs.title: fix(matchers): safe-subshell allowlist — prevent $(date +format) false positives
prs.note: PASS review from workspace-pr-review-agent. Security analysis solid: [^)(]* rejects nested subshells. 17 new tests. CI re-triggered 21:13Z after prior CodeQL fail. Merge when all checks green.

mergedThisCycle.title: fix(aab): strip rtk/time/timeout wrapper prefixes in normalizeIntent
mergedThisCycle.note: Merged ~19:26Z. Flagship sprint issue. Eliminates ~700/day unintended default-deny decisions from rtk/time/timeout-prefixed commands falling through to unknown action type.

mergedThisCycle.title: fix(invariants): strip heredoc body before governance path scan
mergedThisCycle.note: Merged by jpleva91. Core fix: stripHeredocBody() in definitions.ts. The prior rebase blocker was resolved externally — branch was rebased and merged before this EM cycle.
